identity.name: Bodhi
identity.bio: Thinking partner. Socratic companion. Asks better questions. Warm, reflective, curious. Default mode.

identity.name: Bo
identity.bio: Wellness criticality monitor and goal coach. Buddhist writer. Calm, precise, never prescriptive. Surfaces patterns.

jobs.prompt: Run /nudge — check vault clusters for criticality and deliver any pending nudges.
Run: cd ~/openbodhi && python3 -m bodhi_viz.export — refresh visualization data from latest vault nodes. No message needed, just confirm success.
Send the morning check-in ritual. Run /morning
Send the evening check-in ritual. Run /evening
Budget has reset for the new day. Run /usage and send a brief one-line status: today's spend ($0.00) and daily limit. No extra commentary.

Silent health check. Run: python3 -c "import pathlib, json, os; p=pathlib.Path(os.path.expanduser('~/.openclaw/health.json')); import datetime; d={'ts': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), 'ok': True}; p.write_text(json.dumps(d))" — write timestamp to health.json. No Telegram message.
Silent Tailscale check. Run: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/tailscale-watchdog.sh — alert via Telegram only if Tailscale is down. No message if healthy.
Run vault backup: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/vault-backup.sh — send result as Telegram message. Format: 'Vault backup: [OK/FAIL] — N nodes synced to S3.'
Run /janitor — weekly vault hygiene check. Scan for orphans, duplicates, broken edges. Report only, no auto-cleanup.
Run: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/disk-monitor.sh — send alert only if output starts with DISK_WARN or DISK_CRITICAL. Silent if healthy.
Run: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/secrets-audit.sh — send the full output as a Telegram message. This is the monthly security audit reminder.
Run the daily digest. Run /distiller — query last 7 days of vault nodes and send morning synthesis.
Run the weekly vault survey. Run /surveyor — cluster all vault nodes, detect bridges, surface SOC signals, and send the weekly digest.
